chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1150 of 2018 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.4867/2018 2. For hearing of main case 12.03.2025 Mr. Salman Yousuf, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel this petition is squarely covered by the Division Bench judgment of this Court in the case of Premier Systems Pvt.Ltd. vs. Federation of Pakistan and others reported as PTD 2018 861, hence, may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
